mapper.select:
SELECT TO_CHAR(ll.EVENT_AT, 'HH24') || '시' AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT ll.USER_ID) AS value FROM LEARNING_LOG ll JOIN USERS u ON u.USER_ID = ll.USER_ID JOIN COURSE c ON c.COURSE_ID = ll.COURSE_ID WHERE ll.EVENT_AT >= #{startDate} AND ll.EVENT_AT < #{endDate} + 1
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(ll.EVENT_AT, 'HH24') ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(ll.EVENT_AT, 'HH24'))

WITH weekdays AS ( SELECT 0 AS sort_order, '월' AS label FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 1, '화' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 2, '수' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 3, '목' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 4, '금' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 5, '토' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 6, '일' FROM DUAL ), weekday_counts AS ( SELECT TRUNC(ll.EVENT_AT) - TRUNC(ll.EVENT_AT, 'IW') AS sort_order, COUNT(DISTINCT ll.USER_ID) AS value FROM LEARNING_LOG ll JOIN USERS u ON u.USER_ID = ll.USER_ID JOIN COURSE c ON c.COURSE_ID = ll.COURSE_ID WHERE ll.EVENT_AT >= #{startDate} AND ll.EVENT_AT < #{endDate} + 1
GROUP BY TRUNC(ll.EVENT_AT) - TRUNC(ll.EVENT_AT, 'IW') ) SELECT w.label, NVL(wc.value, 0) AS value FROM weekdays w LEFT JOIN weekday_counts wc ON wc.sort_order = w.sort_order ORDER BY w.sort_order

SELECT TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(week_start, 'MM')) || '/' || TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(week_start, 'W')) || '주' AS label, ROUND(AVG(user_play_seconds) / 3600, 1) AS value FROM ( SELECT TRUNC(ll.EVENT_AT, 'IW') AS week_start, ll.USER_ID, SUM(ll.PLAY_SECONDS) AS user_play_seconds FROM LEARNING_LOG ll JOIN USERS u ON u.USER_ID = ll.USER_ID JOIN COURSE c ON c.COURSE_ID = ll.COURSE_ID WHERE ll.EVENT_AT >= #{startDate} AND ll.EVENT_AT < #{endDate} + 1
GROUP BY TRUNC(ll.EVENT_AT, 'IW'), ll.USER_ID ) GROUP BY week_start ORDER BY week_start

WITH total_users AS ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT u.USER_ID) AS total_count FROM USERS u WHERE u.STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
),
base_applications AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ca.APPLICATION_ID, ca.USER_ID, ca.COURSE_ID, ca.APPLICATION_STATUS, ca.APPLIED_AT FROM COURSE_APPLICATION ca JOIN USERS u ON u.USER_ID = ca.USER_ID JOIN COURSE c ON c.COURSE_ID = ca.COURSE_ID WHERE ca.APPLICATION_STATUS IN ('WAITING', 'APPROVED') AND ca.APPLIED_AT >= #{startDate} AND ca.APPLIED_AT < #{endDate} + 1
),
funnel_counts AS ( SELECT 1 AS sort_order, '신청' AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT ba.USER_ID) AS participant_count FROM base_applications ba
UNION ALL
SELECT 2 AS sort_order, '학습 시작' AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT ba.USER_ID) AS participant_count FROM base_applications ba JOIN COURSE_LEARNING_STATUS cls ON cls.APPLICATION_ID = ba.APPLICATION_ID WHERE ba.APPLICATION_STATUS = 'APPROVED' AND cls.STATUS IN ('IN_PROGRESS', 'COMPLETED') AND cls.STARTED_AT IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 3 AS sort_order, '수료' AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT ba.USER_ID) AS participant_count FROM base_applications ba JOIN COURSE_LEARNING_STATUS cls ON cls.APPLICATION_ID = ba.APPLICATION_ID WHERE ba.APPLICATION_STATUS = 'APPROVED' AND cls.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' AND cls.COMPLETED_AT IS NOT NULL )
SELECT fc.label, NVL(ROUND(fc.participant_count / NULLIF(tu.total_count, 0) * 100, 1), 0) AS value FROM funnel_counts fc CROSS JOIN total_users tu ORDER BY fc.sort_order

WITH kcy_counts AS ( SELECT NVL(u.KCY_RESULT, 'Unclassified') AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT u.USER_ID) AS participant_count FROM COURSE_LEARNING_STATUS cls JOIN USERS u ON u.USER_ID = cls.USER_ID JOIN COURSE c ON c.COURSE_ID = cls.COURSE_ID WHERE cls.STATUS != 'CANCELED' AND cls.UPDATED_AT >= #{startDate} AND cls.UPDATED_AT < #{endDate} + 1
GROUP BY NVL(u.KCY_RESULT, 'Unclassified') ), ranked_counts AS ( SELECT label, participant_count, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY participant_count DESC, label) AS rank_order FROM kcy_counts ), grouped_counts AS ( SELECT CASE WHEN rank_order <= 5 THEN label ELSE '기타' END AS label, CASE WHEN rank_order <= 5 THEN rank_order ELSE 6 END AS sort_order, SUM(participant_count) AS participant_count FROM ranked_counts GROUP BY CASE WHEN rank_order <= 5 THEN label ELSE '기타' END, CASE WHEN rank_order <= 5 THEN rank_order ELSE 6 END ) SELECT label, NVL(ROUND(participant_count / NULLIF(SUM(participant_count) OVER (), 0) * 100, 1), 0) AS value FROM grouped_counts ORDER BY sort_order

SELECT comp.COMPETENCY_NAME AS label, ROUND(AVG(ucs.SCORE), 1) AS value FROM USER_COMPETENCY_SCORE ucs JOIN COMPETENCY comp ON comp.COMPETENCY_ID = ucs.COMPETENCY_ID JOIN USERS u ON u.USER_ID = ucs.USER_ID WHERE comp.USE_YN = 'Y' AND ucs.CALCULATED_AT >= #{startDate} AND ucs.CALCULATED_AT < #{endDate} + 1
GROUP BY comp.COMPETENCY_NAME ORDER BY comp.COMPETENCY_NAME

SELECT comp.COMPETENCY_NAME AS label, ROUND(AVG(ucs.SCORE), 1) AS value FROM USER_COMPETENCY_SCORE ucs JOIN COMPETENCY comp ON comp.COMPETENCY_ID = ucs.COMPETENCY_ID JOIN USERS u ON u.USER_ID = ucs.USER_ID WHERE comp.USE_YN = 'Y' AND ucs.CALCULATED_AT >= #{startDate} AND ucs.CALCULATED_AT < #{endDate} + 1 GROUP BY comp.COMPETENCY_NAME ORDER BY comp.COMPETENCY_NAME

WITH periods AS ( SELECT period_start, CASE #{periodUnit} WHEN 'DAY' THEN period_start + 1 WHEN 'WEEK' THEN period_start + 7 WHEN 'MONTH' THEN ADD_MONTHS(period_start, 1) ELSE ADD_MONTHS(period_start, 3) END AS period_end, CASE #{periodUnit} WHEN 'DAY' THEN TO_CHAR(period_start, 'MM/DD') WHEN 'WEEK' THEN TO_CHAR(period_start, 'MM/DD') || '주' WHEN 'MONTH' THEN TO_CHAR(period_start, 'YYYY-MM') ELSE TO_CHAR(period_start, 'YYYY') || ' Q' || TO_CHAR(period_start, 'Q') END AS period_label FROM ( SELECT CASE #{periodUnit} WHEN 'DAY' THEN #{startDate} + LEVEL - 1 WHEN 'WEEK' THEN TRUNC(#{startDate}, 'IW') + ((LEVEL - 1) * 7) WHEN 'MONTH' THEN ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(#{startDate}, 'MM'), LEVEL - 1) ELSE ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(#{startDate}, 'Q'), (LEVEL - 1) * 3) END AS period_start FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= CASE #{periodUnit} WHEN 'DAY' THEN TRUNC(#{endDate}) - TRUNC(#{startDate}) + 1 WHEN 'WEEK' THEN CEIL((TRUNC(#{endDate}) - TRUNC(#{startDate}, 'IW') + 1) / 7) WHEN 'MONTH' THEN FLOOR(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TRUNC(#{endDate}, 'MM'), TRUNC(#{startDate}, 'MM'))) + 1 ELSE FLOOR(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TRUNC(#{endDate}, 'Q'), TRUNC(#{startDate}, 'Q')) / 3) + 1 END ) WHERE period_start < #{endDate} + 1 ), period_scores AS ( SELECT p.period_start, AVG(csh.SCORE) AS average_score FROM periods p JOIN COMPETENCY_SCORE_HISTORY csh ON csh.CALCULATED_AT >= p.period_start AND csh.CALCULATED_AT < p.period_end JOIN USERS u ON u.USER_ID = csh.USER_ID WHERE csh.CALCULATED_AT >= #{startDate} AND csh.CALCULATED_AT < #{endDate} + 1
GROUP BY p.period_start ), baseline_score AS ( SELECT MAX(average_score) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY period_start) AS value FROM period_scores ) SELECT p.period_label AS label, NVL(ROUND( (ps.average_score - bs.value) / NULLIF(bs.value, 0) * 100, 1 ), 0) AS value FROM periods p LEFT JOIN period_scores ps ON ps.period_start = p.period_start CROSS JOIN baseline_score bs ORDER BY p.period_start

WITH periods AS ( SELECT month_start, ADD_MONTHS(month_start, 1) AS month_end, TO_CHAR(month_start, 'YYYY-MM') AS period_label FROM ( SELECT ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(#{startDate}, 'MM'), LEVEL - 1) AS month_start FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= FLOOR(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TRUNC(#{endDate}, 'MM'), TRUNC(#{startDate}, 'MM'))) + 1 ) WHERE month_start < #{endDate} + 1 ), period_scores AS ( SELECT p.month_start, AVG(csh.SCORE) AS average_score FROM periods p JOIN COMPETENCY_SCORE_HISTORY csh ON csh.CALCULATED_AT >= p.month_start AND csh.CALCULATED_AT < p.month_end JOIN USERS u ON u.USER_ID = csh.USER_ID WHERE csh.CALCULATED_AT >= #{startDate} AND csh.CALCULATED_AT < #{endDate} + 1
GROUP BY p.month_start ), baseline_score AS ( SELECT MAX(average_score) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY month_start) AS value FROM period_scores ) SELECT p.period_label AS label, NVL(ROUND( (ps.average_score - bs.value) / NULLIF(bs.value, 0) * 100, 1 ), 0) AS value FROM periods p LEFT JOIN period_scores ps ON ps.month_start = p.month_start CROSS JOIN baseline_score bs ORDER BY p.month_start

WITH periods AS ( SELECT month_start, TO_CHAR(month_start, 'YYYY-MM') AS period_label FROM ( SELECT ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(#{startDate}, 'MM'), LEVEL - 1) AS month_start FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= FLOOR(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TRUNC(#{endDate}, 'MM'), TRUNC(#{startDate}, 'MM'))) + 1 ) WHERE month_start < #{endDate} + 1 ), completed_counts AS ( SELECT TRUNC(cls.COMPLETED_AT, 'MM') AS month_start, COUNT(DISTINCT cls.COURSE_LEARNING_ID) AS completed_count FROM COURSE_LEARNING_STATUS cls JOIN USERS u ON u.USER_ID = cls.USER_ID JOIN COURSE c ON c.COURSE_ID = cls.COURSE_ID WHERE cls.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' AND cls.COMPLETED_AT IS NOT NULL AND cls.COMPLETED_AT >= #{startDate} AND cls.COMPLETED_AT < #{endDate} + 1
GROUP BY TRUNC(cls.COMPLETED_AT, 'MM') ) SELECT p.period_label AS label, NVL(cc.completed_count, 0) AS value FROM periods p LEFT JOIN completed_counts cc ON cc.month_start = p.month_start ORDER BY p.month_start
